response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates deep technical breadth across distributed systems, high-throughput architectures, and AI-agent tooling, with strong ownership and operational experience — all core to the role. His hands-on work with agentic workflows at re:cinq and experience in fast-paced environments align well, though his limited explicit Python exposure and lack of documented AI/ML product experience are minor gaps.
strengths: Proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic code generation workflows at re:cinq
Strong track record in high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems (e.g., DLang microservices handling millions of requests/sec)
Demonstrated operational ownership, CI/CD mastery, and cross-functional collaboration across startups and scale-ups
concerns: Python expertise not explicitly highlighted despite being a must-have
No clear evidence of direct LLM/ML product experience or AI-native engineering environments
German language proficiency is basic, potentially limiting stakeholder alignment in Berlin-based team
